name: ELEMENTAL BOXER

abilities.name: Hard to Kill
abilities.text: When this model suffers damage, if it has 2 or more health, it may not be reduced to below 1 health.

abilities.name: Unionized
abilities.text: While within 3" of another ally, this model receives a (+) to its Df and Wp duels.

actions.name: Quick Jab
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This model chooses whether this action is resisted by Df, Wp, or Sp.

triggers.name: Ember
triggers.text: The target gains a Burning token.

triggers.name: Arcane Jolt
triggers.text: Remove a token from the target to have the target gain a Slow token.

actions.name: Sparring Partner
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This action may target friendly models.
actions.effects: Move the target up to 3". Then, this model may move up to 3", which must end within 3" of the target.

extraction_notes: Quick Jab has Rst value of 'X' which is unusual for an attack action - this represents variable resistance chosen by the attacker
Sparring Partner is listed under the 'Sparring Partner' label with stat line showing 'Df' where Rst normally appears, but has TN of 10 suggesting it's a tactical action resisted by Df
